outlook.volatilityExpectation: Heightened volatility expected: spot pinned at multi-expiry gamma flip with negative GEX in weekly/monthly expiries creating asymmetric risk. 0DTE positive GEX provides intraday stability, but any directional break could accelerate rapidly.
outlook.summary: Price is precisely at the harmonic convergence point: spot 686.08 equals the gamma flip for WEEKLY_1, MONTHLY_1, and MONTHLY_2 expiries, while 0DTE max pain sits at 686.0. This creates a magnetic pinning effect for the session. However, the structural backdrop is fragile - combined weekly/monthly GEX is deeply negative (-3.59B), meaning dealers are short gamma and will amplify any move away from this level. The 0DTE positive GEX (+0.83B) creates a short-term stability buffer. Key inflection: watch for break above 690 (weekly max pain) for bullish acceleration, or drop below 682 for bearish cascade toward 675-670 support zone. Major structural resistance at 700 (resonance level across 4+ expiries).

levels.motivazione: Harmonic convergence: spot sits exactly at gamma flip for WEEKLY_1, MONTHLY_1, and MONTHLY_2. 0DTE max pain at 686.0 creates magnetic pinning. Critical decision point - dealers will defend this level aggressively.

Multi-expiry resonance: dominant call wall in WEEKLY_1 (41,376 OI) and MONTHLY_1 (42,439 OI). Significant call concentration in all 5 expiries. Major structural resistance - dealers will sell into rallies toward this level.
Strongest multi-expiry support: top put in MONTHLY_1 (82,007 OI), significant in all 5 expiries. Dealers will provide delta hedging support. Key downside target if 682-680 breaks.
Confluence support: top put in 0DTE (21,309 OI) and WEEKLY_2 (19,192 OI), significant in all expiries. Secondary structural support below 675.
Magnetic attraction zone: mixed put/call OI across expiries. MONTHLY_1 shows 41,114 put OI vs 39,710 call OI. Near 0DTE max pain (686.0) and WEEKLY_2 max pain (685.0). Pin risk territory.
WEEKLY_1 max pain level with significant call OI (6,386) and put OI (19,330). Upside target for pinning. Break above triggers short-covering toward 695-700.
Major put confluence: top put in WEEKLY_1 (38,140 OI) and MONTHLY_2 (23,016 OI). Deep structural support - final defense before 660 zone.
Top 0DTE call wall (9,716 OI). Near-term resistance with high volume (3,953). Dealers sell calls here, capping upside unless breakout volume exceeds threshold.
Significant put concentration: 0DTE (10,182 OI), WEEKLY_1 (15,906 OI), MONTHLY_1 (50,759 OI). First support layer below spot. Negative GEX amplifies importance.

The massive 25075 CALL WALL (4018 OI) caps immediate upside. Positive total GEX suggests dealer hedging will suppress volatility, but break above 25075 or below 24500 could trigger directional acceleration.
